name: vendor-payment-status
description: Summarizes a supplier's open invoices, average days-to-pay, credit block, and outstanding balance across company codes.
utterances: What's the payment status of Acme Corp?
How much do we owe V-500?
Show open invoices for supplier V-500
Is Acme Corp on payment block?

parameters.name: supplierRef
parameters.description: Supplier code (e.g. V-500) OR company name (e.g. 'Acme Corp'). If a name, resolve via BusinessPartner.search first.

parameters.name: companyCode
parameters.description: Restrict to one company code. Default: aggregate across all authorized company codes.

input.$filter: IsSupplier eq true and (BusinessPartner eq '{{ supplierRef }}' or contains(SearchTerm1, '{{ supplierRef }}'))
InvoicingParty eq '{{ resolvedSupplierId }}' and PaymentBlockingReason ne '3'{% if companyCode %} and CompanyCode eq '{{ companyCode }}'{% endif %}
